⚛ NEUROCORE Layer 1 Cognitive Flow Engine
EQUILIBRIUM: --

NeuroCore

Deterministic cognitive governance engine. Attention stability, intention routing, emotional regulation, and cognitive load management — 42 nodes across 4 irreducible primitives. The mind is a system. We route it like one.

4 PRIMITIVES
42 NODES
-- EQUILIBRIUM
Architecture
The cognitive system decomposes into four irreducible neural flows
◉
Attention
10 NODES
Focal stability, distractibility, attentional bandwidth, and vigilance governance.
➤
Intention
10 NODES
Goal clarity, decision confidence, volition strength, and planning horizon control.
♦
Emotional
11 NODES
Mood baseline, anxiety load, emotional reactivity, and affect stability governance.
⚙
Cognitive
11 NODES
Working memory load, processing speed, burnout pressure, and cognitive flexibility.
How It Works
NeuroCore reads the mind like a deterministic system
01
4 Primitives
Every cognitive state reduces to four irreducible flows: Attention, Intention, Emotional, and Cognitive Load. These are the four axes of the engine.
02
42 Nodes
Each flow decomposes into 10-11 measurable nodes (focus stability, decision paralysis, rumination level, etc.) — 42 total. Each holds a value from 0 (critical) to 100 (optimal).
03
Continuous Sensing
NeuroCore continuously reads all 42 nodes, computes cognitive pressures, and maintains an equilibrium score — a single number representing total cognitive stability.
04
Deterministic Governance
When cognitive load exceeds safe thresholds or emotional regulation fails, the engine flags, escalates, and reroutes. No guessing. Pure deterministic neural flow control.
--
Equilibrium
Live Telemetry
Real-time node monitoring across the active primitive
NEUROCORE.
© 2026 Invariant Foundation. Deterministic Cognitive Governance.
